message:
audit: scheduler/{worker,local_queue,global_injector} + net/dns/cache — all SOUND

Deep correctness audits under bd-2wds9:
- worker.rs: Parker Mutex+Condvar+AtomicBool correct, WorkStealingWaker dedup sound
- local_queue.rs: arena→stack lock order consistent, steal_batch safe via arena serialization
- global_injector.rs: lock-free SegQueue + single Mutex timed lane, min-heap correct
- dns/cache.rs: two RwLock consistent nesting (ip_cache→stats), TOCTOU double-check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
